language.switchToEnglishHint: Changes the auth screen copy to English.
language.switchToKoreanHint: Changes the auth screen copy to Korean.

signIn.title: Welcome
signIn.subtitle: Write one line a day. Later, it becomes self-knowledge.
signIn.emailHint: Enter the email address for your account.
signIn.showPasswordHint: Shows the password characters on screen.
signIn.resetToast: Enter your account email above first.
signIn.resetSentToast: If this account exists, a reset link is on its way.
signIn.resetHint: Sends a secure reset link to the email entered above.
signIn.resetBody: Enter the email for your account above, then tap Forgot password. We will send a secure link without revealing whether the address is registered.
signIn.resetSentBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, the reset link opens a secure screen to set a new password.

signUp.title: Get started
signUp.subtitle: Write one line first. Your account keeps those pieces together.
signUp.ageNotice: You can create an account if you are 16 or older.
signUp.browseBeforeCommitHint: Opens the app manual before creating an account.
signUp.passwordHelper: 8+ characters. Mixed case and a number make it harder to guess.
signUp.birthDateHelper: You must be at least 16. We don't share your date of birth.
signUp.existingAccountBody: If this email is already registered, a second account can't be created with it. Try signing in instead, or reset your password from the sign-in screen.
signUp.emailHint: Enter the email address for the account you want to create.
signUp.passwordHint: Enter the password for your new account.

completeProfile.title: One more step
completeProfile.subtitle: We need your date of birth to confirm your age. We don't share it.
completeProfile.submitHint: Saves your date of birth and consent, then opens the app.
completeProfile.cancelHint: Signs out and returns to sign-in.

oauthCallback.failureMessage: Couldn't complete sign-in. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Use the latest reset link from your email.
resetPassword.expiredBody: This screen needs the secure session from your reset email. Request a new link from sign-in if this one expired.
resetPassword.newPasswordHint: Enter the new password for your account.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.submitHint: Saves the new password for this account.

errors.ageGate: You must be at least 16 to use 2nd-Brain.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalidBirthDate: Enter your date of birth as YYYY-MM-DD.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.breachedPassword: This password showed up in a known data breach. Please choose a different one.
errors.signInFailed: Sign-in failed. Please check your email and password.
errors.passwordResetFailed: Could not send the reset link. Please try again in a moment.
errors.passwordUpdateFailed: Could not update your password. Request a new link if this one expired.
errors.signUpFailed: Sign-up failed. Please try again in a moment.
errors.oauthSignInStartFailed: Could not start {{provider}} sign-in. Please try again in a moment.
errors.oauthSignUpStartFailed: Could not start {{provider}} sign-up. Please try again in a moment.
errors.completeProfileSaveFailed: Could not save your profile. Please try again in a moment.
errors.signOutFailed: Could not sign out. Please try again in a moment.
